title: Rocks Comes to Elbaf
description: On pages 14–14, this part follows Unknown person #13, Loki as The story turns toward Elbaf’s past, Loki, Rocks, Harald, and the ancient grudges shaping the island’s present conflict.
scene: The story turns toward Elbaf’s past, Loki, Rocks, Harald, and the ancient grudges shaping the island’s present conflict.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Quit inviting me!! I told you I'm the King!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'm going to go claim it!! The whole damn world!!

dialogue.speaker: Loki
dialogue.text: LOKI suddenly realized he had found salvation...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Four years passed. Harald continued rejecting the numerous invitations he received until one day...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...Rocks' plan had finally reached its fruition. Backed by his monstrous crew...

summary: This part advances the Elbaf’s Buried History through 11 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on the immediate conflict, character reactions, and the larger Elbaf mystery.
